name: Solo Warrior (Normal)
description: Single warrior hero in normal difficulty

name: Solo Mage (Normal)
description: Single mage hero in normal difficulty

name: Solo Rogue (Normal)
description: Single rogue hero in normal difficulty

name: Duo Warrior + Mage (Normal)
description: Two-hero party with warrior and mage

name: Trio Warrior + Mage + Cleric (Normal)
description: Three-hero party with tank, DPS, and healer

name: Balanced 6-Hero Party (Normal)
description: Full party with one of each class

name: 4x Warriors (Normal)
description: Mono-class party of four warriors

name: 4x Mages (Normal)
description: Mono-class party of four mages

name: Glass Cannon (Normal)
description: High damage, low survivability party

name: Tank Heavy (Normal)
description: High survivability party with tanks and healer

name: Balanced 6-Hero Party (Hard)
description: Full balanced party in hard difficulty

name: Balanced 6-Hero Party (Easy)
description: Full balanced party in easy difficulty

name: Custom Mode — Max Penalties (+50%)
description: Full party in custom mode with death penalty +50% and wipeout penalty +50% relative to normal. Verifies penalty multipliers are applied.

name: Custom Mode — High EXP (+50%)
description: Full party in custom mode with exp gain +50% and reduced encounter difficulty −50%. A favourable custom configuration.

name: 4x Mages in High Physical Resistance World
description: Magical party facing enemies that strongly resist physical attacks. Mages should excel here because their magical damage bypasses physical resistance.

name: 4x Warriors in High Physical Resistance World
description: Physical party facing enemies that strongly resist physical attacks. Warriors should struggle because their physical damage is heavily reduced.

name: 4x Warriors in High Magical Resistance World
description: Physical party facing enemies that strongly resist magical attacks. Warriors should excel because their physical damage is unaffected.

name: 4x Mages in High Magical Resistance World
description: Magical party facing enemies that strongly resist magical attacks. Mages should struggle because their magical damage is heavily reduced.

name: 4x Warriors in Neutral World
description: Physical party in a world with no environmental resistances. Baseline for comparison with resist worlds.

name: 4x Mages in Neutral World
description: Magical party in a world with no environmental resistances. Baseline for comparison with resist worlds.

name: 4x Mages in High Fire Resistance World
description: Mages (fire-element damage) facing enemies that strongly resist fire. Should significantly underperform compared to a neutral world.

name: 4x Paladins in High Light Resistance World
description: Paladins (light-element damage) facing enemies that strongly resist light. Should underperform compared to a neutral world.

name: 4x Paladins in Neutral World
description: Paladins in a world with no environmental resistances. Baseline for paladin elemental comparison.

name: 4x Warriors in Physical+Fire Resistance World
description: Warriors (physical + neutral) in a world with both physical and fire resistance. Should perform worse than in just physical-resist world since they already take physical penalty.

name: 4x Mages in Physical+Fire Resistance World
description: Mages (magical + fire) in a world with both physical and fire resistance. Mages bypass physical resistance but are hit by fire resistance.

name: Story Mode — Balanced 4-Hero Party (Normal)
description: Story mode simulation: balanced party with boosted XP (custom +50% exp, -50% encounter difficulty) to approximate the 25× story multiplier in a shorter run.

name: Story Mode — Full 6-Hero Party (Normal)
description: Story mode simulation: full party of all classes with story-like XP boost. Validates that a full party can handle story mode encounters.

name: Story Mode — Duo Warrior + Mage
description: Story mode simulation: small party with story-like XP boost. Tests that even a small party can progress through story mode.

name: Adventure — Balanced Party in Fire Environment
description: Adventure-style scenario: balanced 4-hero party in a high-fire environment. Simulates a story-mode adventure where the quest system would generate fire-themed content.

name: Adventure — Full Party in Darkness Environment
description: Adventure-style scenario: full 6-hero party in a high-darkness environment. Simulates a dark-themed adventure with varied elemental resistances.

name: Adventure — Solo Rogue Hard Mode
description: Adventure-style hard mode with a solo rogue. Tests the most challenging adventure configuration.
